task.name: Mentor Help
task.description: Display milestone position, framework progress, and available workflows for the founder journey
task.objective: Show a concise "you are here" orientation. Two modes: general overview (no project loaded) and full progress display (project loaded). Read-only — never modify project state.

llm.rule: Read the complete task before starting execution.
Display output MUST NOT exceed 15 lines.
Framework order MUST match the milestone workflow FRAMEWORK ROUTING table order.
NEVER modify project state — this task is read-only.
All file references use {project-root} path variables.
After displaying output, return to the current menu context. No navigation, no follow-up prompts beyond the menu.

substep.title: Load Data
substep.action: Extract the 6 milestones from the Milestones Summary table (name and goal columns).

substep.title: Display
Return
substep.action: Return to Mentor's current menu. No state change.

substep.title: Extract State
substep.action: From project-memo.md frontmatter (loaded during Mentor activation), extract: projectName, currentMilestone, currentFramework, stepsCompleted.
Parse milestone number N from currentMilestone (e.g., "M1: Conception" → N=1, milestoneName="Conception").
Determine next milestone from the Milestones Summary in {project-root}/_bmad/rbtv/workflows/bi-business-innovation/data/founder-process.md. If N=6, next is "Journey complete".

substep.title: Load Framework Data
substep.action: If found: Parse the FRAMEWORK ROUTING table. Extract each row's Code and Framework name, preserving table order.
If not found (M5/M6): Read {project-root}/_bmad/rbtv/workflows/bi-business-innovation/data/founder-process.md. Extract framework names for M{N} from the Key Frameworks column. No codes available.

substep.title: Compute Framework Status
substep.action: For each framework in order: - If its Output File from FRAMEWORK ROUTING appears in stepsCompleted → mark ✅ - Else if it matches currentFramework → mark 🎯 (append " (current)") - Else: mark 🔜 for the first pending framework (next up), mark ⏳ for all other pending frameworks Count completed frameworks vs total.

substep.title: Build All-Milestones Line with Names
substep.action: From founder-process.md Milestones Summary, get the short name for each of M1–M6 (e.g. Conception, Validation, Brand, Prototypation, Market Validation, MVP). Build one line: M1 {name} {✓|🎯|🔜|⏳} · M2 {name} {✓|🎯|🔜|⏳} · … · M6 {name} {✓|🎯|🔜|⏳}. Use ✓ for milestones before N (completed), 🎯 for M{N} (current), 🔜 for M{N+1} (next), ⏳ for M{N+2} through M6. If N=6, use 🎯 for M6 and no 🔜. Abbreviate long names if needed to keep the line readable (e.g. "Market Val." for Market Validation).

substep.title: Display
Return
substep.action: Return to Mentor's current menu. No state change.
